history.content:
<thought>
I am at the upper-left interior area facing right, but the cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The path downward along the left corridor is open, so I should turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at the upper-left open area facing down. Moving forward would stay on a safe floor cell, while the lava is immediately to my right. Advancing downward keeps me on the only safe corridor toward the lower rows and the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down with open floor directly below me, while the cells to the right are blocked by lava. Moving forward safely brings me closer to the lower open area and eventually toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down with open floor directly below me, while the cells to the right are blocked by lava. Moving downward lets me progress safely toward the open corridor that can lead right to the goal later.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at the left side facing down. Forward is open floor, while the row to my right is lava, so moving down along the left corridor is the safe path toward the goal in the bottom-right area.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6, column 2 facing down. The cell directly ahead is a wall border, so moving forward is blocked. To make progress, I should turn to face right, which opens into a safe floor path along my row.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right on an open corridor. Moving forward is safe and progresses me toward the open path that can lead around the lava barrier to the goal in the lower-right area.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6, column 3 facing right. The cells directly to the right are open, while lava blocks movement upward and the goal is farther to the lower-right. The best next step is to continue moving right along the safe corridor.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6 facing right. The path to the goal is blocked if I continue straight because of the lava barrier below, so I should move right along the safe corridor toward the opening near the far right, then later go down to the goal. The immediate next step is safe and advances me toward that route.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right in an open corridor. The goal is down and to the right, but there is a lava barrier directly below much of this area. The safe path is to continue right along this row toward the opening near the far right, then go down toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right on an open row. The goal is down and to the right, but there is a lava barrier below most columns. I should first move right toward the safe opening near the far-right side.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right (`>`) with an open floor cell directly ahead. The goal is down and to the right, and moving forward along this corridor brings me closer while avoiding lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am near the right side, facing right. The cell directly ahead is a wall, so moving forward is blocked. The goal is below me, so I should turn right to face down toward a safe path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6, column 8 facing down. The cell directly below me is a wall/lava border area and not safe to enter, while turning left would face me toward a clear path along the row toward the open area leading to the goal. So I should rotate first.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6, column 8 facing right, with a wall directly ahead. The goal is down and slightly left at row 8, column 8, so I should first turn to face downward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am near the bottom-right area, facing down toward a wall. The goal is further down-right, but moving forward is blocked. Turning left will face me right toward the open corridor leading closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at the right side of the open corridor, facing right toward a wall. The goal is down and slightly left, and the safe path continues by going downward through the opening below, so I should first turn to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am near the lower-right area, facing down. Moving forward would hit the wall below, so I should turn to face toward the goal, which is down-right from me. First I need to face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at the right side of row 6 facing right, with a wall directly ahead, so moving forward is blocked. The goal is down and slightly left from me. I should first turn to face downward so I can move toward the lower rows.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6, column 8 facing down. The cell directly below me is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. To reach the goal at the bottom-right area, I should first turn to face left, which is the safe open path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6, column 8 facing left. The cell directly left is empty floor, while turning or moving elsewhere is unnecessary right now. Advancing left also keeps me away from the lava below and helps me reposition toward the only safe route to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6, facing left. The cell directly left is empty floor, while turning or moving elsewhere is unnecessary right now. Advancing left continues along the safe corridor toward the lower-right goal area.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing left on an open row. The cells to my left are clear, while the goal is down and to the right, so I should first move left to reach the open vertical corridor that leads downward around the lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6 facing left. The cell directly ahead is open floor, while turning would delay progress. Moving forward also helps me head toward the open left-side corridor that can lead downward around the lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing left at row 6, and the cell directly ahead is a wall of lava-free floor to the left, but moving left leads toward the map edge and not the goal. The goal is down and to the right, so I should first reorient to face upward and navigate around the lava barrier.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>
